How It Works

01

SCAN

Deploy drone or satellite scans. Our AI instantly converts visual data into a tactical density heatmap of your project site.

›
02

PLAN

Draw clearing zones on the 3D map. Calculate exact machine hours and fuel requirements based on actual vegetation density.

›
03

CLEAR

Sync to equipment telematics. Monitor progress in real-time and provide automated reports to clients from the field.
